t2i-kamui-fal-bytedance-seedream-v5-lite.description: ByteDance Seedream V5 Lite Text-to-Image - Generate high-quality images using ByteDance's Seedream 5.0 Lite model. Generate images from text prompts with support for customizable parameters including prompt (required), image size (square_hd, square, portrait_4_3, portrait_16_9, landscape_4_3, landscape_16_9, auto_2K, auto_3K, or custom width/height object - total pixels must be between 2560x1440 and 3072x3072; if outside this range, the image size will be automatically adjusted by scaling), num images (default: 1), max images (default: 1, enables multi-image generation when > 1), sync mode (default: false), and enable safety checker (default: true). Perfect for high-quality text-to-image generation via Kamui Code ⭐⭐⭐
